note: v321: Fixed invoice numbering. Older invoices saved in the long form (e.g. 202601) weren't recognized by the auto-numberer, so new invoices restarted the sequence instead of continuing. The app now rewrites those to the short 2-digit-year form (202601 → 2601, … 202647 → 2647) and continues the sequence, so your next invoice is 2648. Runs automatically on load.
